basic_details.job_title: NCRTC Additional General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) Additional General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of NCRTC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NCRTC Additional General Manager Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NCRTC Additional General Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCRTC Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NCRTC Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource positions is 29 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource post is Any Graduate. Candidates must possess a valid graduate degree to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 140200. This is a consolidated salary for the contract period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource in the National Capital Region Transport Corporation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NCRTC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the NCRTC Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource recruitment involves an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment. Both General/OBC and other categories are exempt from paying a fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Addl. General Manager/ Human Resource position is on a contract basis. Candidates will be appointed for a specific contract period.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article. It is advised to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
